postgres-full_execute_query.name: postgres-full_execute_query
postgres-full_execute_query.description: 【postgres-full】 Run a read-only SQL query (SELECT statements). Executed in read-only mode for safety.

postgres-full_execute_dml_ddl_dcl_tcl.name: postgres-full_execute_dml_ddl_dcl_tcl
postgres-full_execute_dml_ddl_dcl_tcl.description: 【postgres-full】 Execute DML, DDL, DCL, or TCL statements (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, CREATE, ALTER, DROP, etc). Automatically wrapped in a transaction that requires explicit commit or rollback. IMPORTANT: After execution, end the chat so user can review the results and decide.

postgres-full_execute_commit.name: postgres-full_execute_commit
postgres-full_execute_commit.description: 【postgres-full】 Commit a transaction by its ID to permanently apply the changes to the database

postgres-full_execute_rollback.name: postgres-full_execute_rollback
postgres-full_execute_rollback.description: 【postgres-full】 Rollback a transaction by its ID to undo all changes and discard the transaction

postgres-full_list_tables.name: postgres-full_list_tables
postgres-full_list_tables.description: 【postgres-full】 Get a list of all tables in the database

postgres-full_describe_table.name: postgres-full_describe_table
postgres-full_describe_table.description: 【postgres-full】 Get detailed information about a specific table

12306-mcp_get-current-date.name: 12306-mcp_get-current-date
12306-mcp_get-current-date.description: 【12306-mcp】 获取当前日期，以上海时区（Asia/Shanghai, UTC+8）为准，返回格式为 "yyyy-MM-dd"。主要用于解析用户提到的相对日期（如“明天”、“下周三”），提供准确的日期输入。

12306-mcp_get-stations-code-in-city.name: 12306-mcp_get-stations-code-in-city
12306-mcp_get-stations-code-in-city.description: 【12306-mcp】 通过中文城市名查询该城市 **所有** 火车站的名称及其对应的 `station_code`，结果是一个包含多个车站信息的列表。

12306-mcp_get-station-code-of-citys.name: 12306-mcp_get-station-code-of-citys
12306-mcp_get-station-code-of-citys.description: 【12306-mcp】 通过中文城市名查询代表该城市的 `station_code`。此接口主要用于在用户提供**城市名**作为出发地或到达地时，为接口准备 `station_code` 参数。

12306-mcp_get-station-code-by-names.name: 12306-mcp_get-station-code-by-names
12306-mcp_get-station-code-by-names.description: 【12306-mcp】 通过具体的中文车站名查询其 `station_code` 和车站名。此接口主要用于在用户提供**具体车站名**作为出发地或到达地时，为接口准备 `station_code` 参数。

12306-mcp_get-station-by-telecode.name: 12306-mcp_get-station-by-telecode
12306-mcp_get-station-by-telecode.description: 【12306-mcp】 通过车站的 `station_telecode` 查询车站的详细信息，包括名称、拼音、所属城市等。此接口主要用于在已知 `telecode` 的情况下获取更完整的车站数据，或用于特殊查询及调试目的。一般用户对话流程中较少直接触发。

12306-mcp_get-interline-tickets.name: 12306-mcp_get-interline-tickets
12306-mcp_get-interline-tickets.description: 【12306-mcp】 查询12306中转余票信息。尚且只支持查询前十条。

12306-mcp_get-train-route-stations.name: 12306-mcp_get-train-route-stations
12306-mcp_get-train-route-stations.description: 【12306-mcp】 查询特定列车车次在指定区间内的途径车站、到站时间、出发时间及停留时间等详细经停信息。当用户询问某趟具体列车的经停站时使用此接口。

zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchSogou.name: zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchSogou
zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchSogou.description: 【zhipu-web-search-sse】 搜索网络信息，返回结果包括网页标题、网页URL、网页摘要、网站名称、网站图标等。

zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchQuark.name: zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchQuark
zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchQuark.description: 【zhipu-web-search-sse】 搜索网络信息，返回结果包括网页标题、网页URL、网页摘要、网站名称、网站图标等。

zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchPro.name: zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchPro
zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchPro.description: 【zhipu-web-search-sse】 搜索网络信息，返回结果包括网页标题、网页URL、网页摘要、网站名称、网站图标等。

zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchStd.name: zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchStd
zhipu-web-search-sse_webSearchStd.description: 【zhipu-web-search-sse】 搜索网络信息，返回结果包括网页标题、网页URL、网页摘要、网站名称、网站图标等。

github_create_or_update_file.description: 【github】 Create or update a single file in a GitHub repository

github_create_repository.name: github_create_repository
github_create_repository.description: 【github】 Create a new GitHub repository in your account

github_get_file_contents.name: github_get_file_contents
github_get_file_contents.description: 【github】 Get the contents of a file or directory from a GitHub repository

github_push_files.name: github_push_files
github_push_files.description: 【github】 Push multiple files to a GitHub repository in a single commit

github_create_issue.name: github_create_issue
github_create_issue.description: 【github】 Create a new issue in a GitHub repository

github_create_pull_request.name: github_create_pull_request
github_create_pull_request.description: 【github】 Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository

github_fork_repository.name: github_fork_repository
github_fork_repository.description: 【github】 Fork a GitHub repository to your account or specified organization

github_create_branch.name: github_create_branch
github_create_branch.description: 【github】 Create a new branch in a GitHub repository

github_list_commits.name: github_list_commits
github_list_commits.description: 【github】 Get list of commits of a branch in a GitHub repository

github_list_issues.name: github_list_issues
github_list_issues.description: 【github】 List issues in a GitHub repository with filtering options

github_update_issue.name: github_update_issue
github_update_issue.description: 【github】 Update an existing issue in a GitHub repository

github_add_issue_comment.name: github_add_issue_comment
github_add_issue_comment.description: 【github】 Add a comment to an existing issue

github_search_code.name: github_search_code
github_search_code.description: 【github】 Search for code across GitHub repositories

github_search_issues.name: github_search_issues
github_search_issues.description: 【github】 Search for issues and pull requests across GitHub repositories

github_get_issue.name: github_get_issue
github_get_issue.description: 【github】 Get details of a specific issue in a GitHub repository.

github_get_pull_request.name: github_get_pull_request
github_get_pull_request.description: 【github】 Get details of a specific pull request

github_list_pull_requests.name: github_list_pull_requests
github_list_pull_requests.description: 【github】 List and filter repository pull requests

github_create_pull_request_review.name: github_create_pull_request_review
github_create_pull_request_review.description: 【github】 Create a review on a pull request

github_get_pull_request_files.name: github_get_pull_request_files
github_get_pull_request_files.description: 【github】 Get the list of files changed in a pull request

github_get_pull_request_status.name: github_get_pull_request_status
github_get_pull_request_status.description: 【github】 Get the combined status of all status checks for a pull request

github_update_pull_request_branch.name: github_update_pull_request_branch
github_update_pull_request_branch.description: 【github】 Update a pull request branch with the latest changes from the base branch

github_get_pull_request_comments.name: github_get_pull_request_comments
github_get_pull_request_comments.description: 【github】 Get the review comments on a pull request

github_get_pull_request_reviews.name: github_get_pull_request_reviews
github_get_pull_request_reviews.description: 【github】 Get the reviews on a pull request

Gaodeamp_maps_regeocode.name: Gaodeamp_maps_regeocode
Gaodeamp_maps_regeocode.description: 【Gaodeamp】 将一个高德经纬度坐标转换为行政区划地址信息

Gaodeamp_maps_geo.name: Gaodeamp_maps_geo
Gaodeamp_maps_geo.description: 【Gaodeamp】 将详细的结构化地址转换为经纬度坐标。支持对地标性名胜景区、建筑物名称解析为经纬度坐标

Gaodeamp_maps_ip_location.name: Gaodeamp_maps_ip_location
Gaodeamp_maps_ip_location.description: 【Gaodeamp】 IP 定位根据用户输入的 IP 地址，定位 IP 的所在位置

Gaodeamp_maps_weather.name: Gaodeamp_maps_weather
Gaodeamp_maps_weather.description: 【Gaodeamp】 根据城市名称或者标准adcode查询指定城市的天气

Gaodeamp_maps_search_detail.name: Gaodeamp_maps_search_detail
Gaodeamp_maps_search_detail.description: 【Gaodeamp】 查询关键词搜或者周边搜获取到的POI ID的详细信息

Gaodeamp_maps_bicycling.name: Gaodeamp_maps_bicycling
Gaodeamp_maps_bicycling.description: 【Gaodeamp】 骑行路径规划用于规划骑行通勤方案，规划时会考虑天桥、单行线、封路等情况。最大支持 500km 的骑行路线规划

Gaodeamp_maps_direction_walking.name: Gaodeamp_maps_direction_walking
Gaodeamp_maps_direction_walking.description: 【Gaodeamp】 步行路径规划 API 可以根据输入起点终点经纬度坐标规划100km 以内的步行通勤方案，并且返回通勤方案的数据

Gaodeamp_maps_direction_driving.name: Gaodeamp_maps_direction_driving
Gaodeamp_maps_direction_driving.description: 【Gaodeamp】 驾车路径规划 API 可以根据用户起终点经纬度坐标规划以小客车、轿车通勤出行的方案，并且返回通勤方案的数据。

Gaodeamp_maps_direction_transit_integrat.name: Gaodeamp_maps_direction_transit_integrated
Gaodeamp_maps_direction_transit_integrat.description: 【Gaodeamp】 公交路径规划 API 可以根据用户起终点经纬度坐标规划综合各类公共（火车、公交、地铁）交通方式的通勤方案，并且返回通勤方案的数据，跨城场景下必须传起点城市与终点城市

Gaodeamp_maps_distance.name: Gaodeamp_maps_distance
Gaodeamp_maps_distance.description: 【Gaodeamp】 距离测量 API 可以测量两个经纬度坐标之间的距离,支持驾车、步行以及球面距离测量

Gaodeamp_maps_text_search.name: Gaodeamp_maps_text_search
Gaodeamp_maps_text_search.description: 【Gaodeamp】 关键词搜，根据用户传入关键词，搜索出相关的POI

Gaodeamp_maps_around_search.name: Gaodeamp_maps_around_search
Gaodeamp_maps_around_search.description: 【Gaodeamp】 周边搜，根据用户传入关键词以及坐标location，搜索出radius半径范围的POI
